description_long: This radiator features a series of evenly spaced, vertical rectangular fins attached to a flat, rectangular back panel. The fins are robust and extend outward, creating deep channels for air to flow between them, which enhances heat dissipation. The main body and fins are finished in a warm brown color, with the edges of the fins highlighted in a darker, almost black tone, giving the object a modern and industrial appearance. The construction appears to be primarily metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a powder-coated or painted finish for durability and corrosion resistance. There are no visible valves, grilles, or pipe connections on the exterior, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall form is solid and geometric, suitable for mounting on a wall in urban interiors or utility spaces.
description: A modern radiator with vertical rectangular fins and a flat back panel, finished in brown and dark tones. The design is robust, geometric, and industrial, with no visible valves or grilles.
description_view_0: Front view showing six prominent vertical fins attached to a flat brown panel, with dark edges accentuating the structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the fins and the narrow profile of the radiator, emphasizing the spacing between each fin.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the vertical fins and flat panel, with the same color scheme and structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the depth and regular spacing of the vertical fins, with a clear view of the panel's thickness.
attribute_grille_pattern: solid panel with exposed vertical fins
